write: auth != null && auth.loginType != 'ANONYMOUS' && (resource.openid == auth.openid || resource.openid == auth.uid) && /^staging\//.test(resource.path) == true && resource.size <= 5242880 && (/\.jpg$/.test(resource.path) == true || /\.jpeg$/.test(resource.path) == true || /\.png$/.test(resource.path) == true || /\.webp$/.test(resource.path) == true)
